headline: Does Cboe (CBOE) Pairing Record Volumes With Longer Hours Reveal Its Next Profit Engine?
summary: Cboe Global Markets recently reported record May 2026 trading activity, with its four U.S. options exchanges and iBoxx index futures reaching new volume highs, and also received regulatory approval to extend trading hours for certain options. Alongside these operational achievements, the company moved to appoint experienced clearing and risk executive Boudewijn Duinstra as chief risk officer, signaling a stronger emphasis on global risk management, resilience, and governance. We’ll now...

headline: Down 19.1% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why You Should You Buy the Dip in CBOE (CBOE)
summary: CBOE (CBOE) has become technically an oversold stock now, which implies exhaustion of the heavy selling pressure on it. This, combined with strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher, indicates a potential trend reversal for the stock in the near term.

headline: Guidance Miss Becomes a Bloodbath: DRAM’s 15% Implosion is At The Center
summary: The Roundhill Memory ETF (CBOE:DRAM) closed Friday, June 5, 2026 at $55.79, down 15% on the day from a prior close of $65.70. Over the two-day window from June 3 through June 5, the fund dropped 20%, going from $69.71 to that Friday close. If you had $10,000 in DRAM at Wednesday’s open, you had ...
